mnemonics: TO OTHER FIELDS: TAG - Types Always Go Outside Relevant Fields, Similar Thinking
TYPES OF MACHINE LEARNING: TITAN - Three Types: Supervised, Unsupervised, Reinforcement
CHALLENGES OF MACHINE LEARNING: COPES - Conceptual Problems Often Create Errors, Sample Sizing
MACHINE LEARNING PROCESS: MAPS - Model, Algorithm, Prediction, Solution
MACHINE LEARNING APPLICATIONS: MAGIC - Medical, Image, Chat, Gaming
keyPoints: Machine learning is used in various fields like healthcare, finance, and marketing.
There are three main types of machine learning: supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement.
Common challenges in machine learning include data quality, sample size, and concept drift.
The machine learning process involves data preparation, model selection, training, and evaluation.
Machine learning applications are diverse and include medical diagnosis, image recognition, chatbots, and gaming.
